title: [CI:DOCS] fix misleading save/load usage
body:
Fix the container archive description in podman save/load docs that may lead to misusing the save/load instead of import/export for containers.
related https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/8407#issuecomment-732414865
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body: A couple of small suggestions, it's not wrong as is, but I think it's better with the 'a'.
